name: Welcome Message
description: Sent to a user immediately after they register.
subject: Welcome to {{company_name}}!
content:
Hello {{user_name}},

Welcome to {{company_name}}! We are thrilled to have you.

You can login here: Login

name: Registration OTP
description: Sent when a user starts registration to verify their email.
subject: Registration OTP - {{company_name}}
content:
Hello {{user_name}},

Your OTP code to verify your email for registration is: {{otp_code}}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

name: Password Reset OTP
description: Sent when a user requests to reset their password.
subject: Password Reset OTP - {{company_name}}
content:
Hello {{user_name}},

Your OTP code to reset your password is: {{otp_code}}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

name: Resend OTP
description: Sent when a user requests to resend their OTP.
subject: Resend OTP - {{company_name}}
content:
Hello {{user_name}},

Your requested OTP code is: {{otp_code}}

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

name: Password Reset Success
description: Sent when a user successfully resets their password.
subject: Password Changed Successfully - {{company_name}}
content:
Hello {{user_name}},

Your password has been successfully reset. If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

name: Plan Activation
description: Sent when a user successfully subscribes to a new plan.
subject: Plan Activated - {{company_name}}
content:
Hello {{user_name}},

Your plan {{plan_name}} has been activated for {{validity_days}} days. You paid {{amount_paid}}.

name: Plan Renewal Reminder
description: Sent as a reminder before a user's plan expires.
subject: Plan Renewal Reminder - {{company_name}}
content:
Hello {{user_name}},

Your plan {{plan_name}} expires in {{days_remaining}} days. Renew now.

name: Plan Expiration
description: Sent when a user's plan has expired.
subject: Plan Expired - {{company_name}}
content:
Hello {{user_name}},

Your plan {{plan_name}} has expired. Please renew to continue using our services.
